kaijuAlphaBeginnerGuide.title: Kaiju Alpha Beginner Guide
kaijuAlphaBeginnerGuide.intro: Kaiju Alpha is built around five combat skills, two roars and constant movement between attacks. Begin with a forgiving kaiju, practice against buildings and isolated enemies, then move into larger fights once your range and cooldowns feel natural.

steps.title: Choose a Forgiving First Kaiju
steps.description: Kamata-Kun is a practical beginner pick because its ranged pressure works well against the many kaiju that rely on close combat. Godzilla Junior and Suko are also useful early farming choices with straightforward movement and attacks.
steps.tip: Use one main kaiju until its controls and attack range feel natural.

steps.title: Learn the Core Controls
steps.description: Press 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5 to activate your kaiju's five skills. Press R for Roar 1 and T for Roar 2.
steps.tip: Test every skill outside a crowded fight so you can recognize its range, animation and cooldown.

steps.title: Keep Moving During Combat
steps.description: Strafe around opponents instead of standing directly in front of them. Movement makes it far easier to avoid beams, charges and slow high-damage attacks.
steps.tip: Attack after an enemy misses a long animation rather than starting every exchange yourself.

steps.title: Use Skills in a Simple Rotation
steps.description: Open with a ranged or area attack, follow with reliable damage skills and save your strongest move for a clear hit. Avoid pressing every ability at once.
steps.tip: Always keep at least one attack available while the rest of your kit is cooling down.

steps.title: Farm Before Chasing PvP Wins
steps.description: Destroy dense groups of buildings and use wide attacks to earn experience and Cells consistently. Farming is safer and more reliable than repeatedly challenging stronger players.
steps.tip: Choose routes with several nearby targets so less time is spent walking between attacks.

steps.title: Spend Cells on One Progression Goal
steps.description: Save toward a kaiju that improves your preferred role, such as farming, ranged combat, mobility or close-range pressure. Buying several minor upgrades can delay a more useful unlock.
steps.tip: Keep one dependable farmer available while leveling a new combat-focused kaiju.

quickTips: Stick to one kaiju until its five skills and two roars feel automatic.
Strafe constantly — standing still makes you an easy target for beams and charges.
Rotate skills so one attack is always ready while the others recharge.
Farm buildings for Cells before chasing stronger players in PvP.

kaijuAlphaTierList.title: Kaiju Alpha Tier List
kaijuAlphaTierList.intro: The strongest choice depends on how you play. Heavy kaiju dominate direct fights, mobile characters punish missed attacks, and wide-area kits earn experience and Cells faster when farming buildings. These rankings cover PvP, farming and overall usefulness.

tiers.label: Top All-Rounders
tiers.summary: Powerful kaiju with strong damage, reliable pressure and enough tools to handle most matchups.

kaiju.name: Final Wars Godzilla
kaiju.strengths: Strong melee pressure, ranged damage and finishing power.
kaiju.weaknesses: Large animations can be punished when attacks miss.

kaiju.name: Destoroyah Final Form
kaiju.strengths: High close-range threat, strong finishing attacks and durable presence.
kaiju.weaknesses: Most dangerous tools require committing at close range.

kaiju.name: Godzilla 2019
kaiju.strengths: Reliable atomic attacks, solid survivability and consistent damage.

tiers.label: Strong Specialists
tiers.summary: Excellent choices that dominate specific activities or reward players who use their strengths correctly.

kaiju.name: Monster X
kaiju.strengths: Fast pressure, energy attacks and strong one-on-one combat.
kaiju.weaknesses: Requires accurate timing to maintain a combo.

kaiju.name: Biollante
kaiju.strengths: Large attack coverage and efficient damage against grouped targets.
kaiju.weaknesses: Large body and limited mobility make repositioning slower.

kaiju.name: Showa Jet Jaguar
kaiju.strengths: Fast movement, physical combos and strong repositioning.
kaiju.weaknesses: Moderate damage requires repeated clean hits.

tiers.label: Reliable Progression Picks
tiers.summary: Accessible and useful kaiju that perform well while players learn farming routes and combat fundamentals.

kaiju.name: Kamata-Kun
kaiju.strengths: Can pressure close-range opponents from a safer distance.
kaiju.weaknesses: Lower direct brawling power when enemies reach melee range.

kaiju.name: Suko
kaiju.strengths: Good movement and easy access to repeated targets.
kaiju.weaknesses: Lower reach and durability than heavyweight kaiju.

kaiju.name: Kong
kaiju.strengths: Direct physical damage and strong pressure at melee range.
kaiju.weaknesses: Limited options against opponents that maintain distance.

kaijuAlphaKaijuAbilities.title: Kaiju Alpha Kaiju and Abilities
kaijuAlphaKaijuAbilities.intro: Every kaiju uses five numbered skills and two roar inputs, but their practical roles differ. Some specialize in beams and ranged pressure, while others rely on mobility, physical combos or wide attacks that clear groups of buildings. Find one that matches your preferred range and progression goal.

kaiju.name: Final Wars Godzilla
kaiju.attackStyle: Melee chains and ranged atomic pressure.
kaiju.bestUse: Players who want one kaiju for both PvP and general farming.

kaiju.name: Showa Jet Jaguar
kaiju.attackStyle: Fast physical attacks and aerial repositioning.
kaiju.bestUse: Chasing slower targets and avoiding heavy attacks.

kaiju.name: Destoroyah Final Form
kaiju.attackStyle: Powerful close-range attacks with energy-based pressure.
kaiju.bestUse: Aggressive fights where enemies cannot maintain distance.

kaiju.name: Monster X
kaiju.attackStyle: Quick melee strings supported by ranged energy attacks.
kaiju.bestUse: One-on-one combat and catching retreating players.

kaiju.name: Godzilla 2019
kaiju.attackStyle: Atomic breath combined with body and tail attacks.

kaiju.name: Biollante
kaiju.attackStyle: Wide plant-based attacks that cover multiple targets.
kaiju.bestUse: Destroying building clusters and controlling crowded areas.

kaiju.name: Kamata-Kun
kaiju.attackStyle: Forward area attacks and ranged harassment.
kaiju.bestUse: New players learning spacing and cooldown management.

kaiju.name: Suko
kaiju.bestUse: Early farming routes and learning movement.

kaiju.name: Godzilla Junior
kaiju.attackStyle: Balanced physical attacks and atomic damage.
kaiju.bestUse: Earning early Cells before purchasing a specialized farmer.

kaijuAlphaLevelingCellFarming.title: Kaiju Alpha Leveling and Cell Farming Guide
kaijuAlphaLevelingCellFarming.intro: Fast progression comes from reducing downtime between targets. Wide-area kaiju can damage several buildings at once, while mobile starters help new players rotate between city blocks without spending most of the session travelling.

steps.title: Select a Farming Kaiju
steps.description: Use Biollante when you need large attack coverage. Godzilla Junior and Suko provide accessible alternatives while saving Cells for a stronger farming unlock.
steps.tip: Prioritize attack coverage and movement over one-hit PvP damage.

steps.title: Find Dense Building Groups
steps.description: Begin in an area where several destructible buildings stand close together. Dense groups provide more targets for each skill and reduce travel time.
steps.tip: Leave isolated structures until your main route is temporarily empty.

steps.title: Open With Wide-Area Skills
steps.description: Use attacks that can hit multiple structures before using narrow single-target moves. This produces more value from each cooldown.
steps.tip: Stand where the center of the attack can overlap several buildings.

steps.title: Rotate Skills Instead of Spamming
steps.description: Cycle through short and medium cooldown attacks while keeping one skill ready for the next group. Pressing the entire kit on one target creates unnecessary downtime.
steps.tip: Move toward the next block while your longest ability is recharging.

steps.title: Avoid Unnecessary PvP
steps.description: Extended fights can interrupt an efficient farming route and provide less consistent progress than clearing buildings. Disengage from stronger players when leveling is the main goal.
steps.tip: Use mobility and terrain to create distance rather than restarting a losing fight.

steps.title: Repeat a Fixed Route
steps.description: Travel through the same sequence of high-density areas and return after targets begin reappearing. A familiar loop is faster than searching the whole map randomly.
steps.tip: Adjust the route when another player is already clearing one of your main areas.

steps.title: Push One Kaiju Toward Level 200
steps.description: Concentrate experience on a reliable farmer before dividing time across the roster. A high-level farming kaiju makes later Cell collection and new unlocks easier.
steps.tip: After reaching your main leveling target, use the farmer to fund your next PvP or specialist kaiju.

quickTips: Pick one farming kaiju and push it high before splitting time across the roster.
Wide-area skills outperform single-target moves when clearing buildings.
Keep one skill off cooldown so you always have an answer for the next group.
A repeated route beats wandering — return as buildings respawn.

kaijuAlphaControlsAndCombatGuide.title: Kaiju Alpha Controls and Combat Guide
kaijuAlphaControlsAndCombatGuide.intro: Kaiju Alpha uses five numbered skill slots and two separate roar abilities. Strong play depends on spacing, choosing the right skill order and keeping enough stamina available to move after attacking.

controls.bestUse: Approaching enemies, retreating and circling around attacks.
controls.combatTip: Move diagonally instead of walking directly toward ranged attacks.

controls.bestUse: Tracking moving, flying or swimming opponents.
controls.combatTip: Keep the enemy near the center of the screen before activating a directional skill.

controls.bestUse: Usually the first or most frequently available move in a kaiju's kit.
controls.combatTip: Use shorter-cooldown skills to pressure opponents without spending every ability at once.

controls.bestUse: Follow-up attacks, movement tools or close-range pressure depending on the kaiju.
controls.combatTip: Confirm that the first attack connects before committing to the next skill.

controls.bestUse: Mid-combo damage, control or ranged pressure.
controls.combatTip: Save control skills for enemies trying to escape or begin a major attack.

controls.bestUse: Stronger attacks with longer animations or cooldowns.
controls.combatTip: Use high-commitment skills after the opponent misses or becomes locked in an animation.

controls.bestUse: A kaiju's final skill slot, commonly reserved for a major attack or signature ability.
controls.combatTip: Do not open every fight with Skill 5; create a clear hit opportunity first.

controls.bestUse: Kaiju-specific roar effects and combat utility.
controls.combatTip: Learn whether your selected kaiju's first roar is offensive, defensive or used to create space.
Keep one roar available when fighting multiple players or when an opponent begins a full combo.

controls.bestUse: Long fights and escaping after a missed ability.
controls.combatTip: Stop attacking before the resource bar is empty so you can reposition instead of becoming an easy target.

controls.bestUse: Avoiding predictable trades and group attacks.
controls.combatTip: Fight near open ground, keep groups in front of you and avoid being trapped between a kaiju and a building.

kaijuAlphaUnlockRequirements.title: Kaiju Alpha Unlock Requirements
kaijuAlphaUnlockRequirements.intro: Kaiju Alpha mixes direct Cell purchases with level requirements, prerequisite forms and map objectives. Monster Zero has one of the clearest special unlock routes, requiring ten skull collectibles placed around the world map.

unlocks.name: Monster Zero
unlocks.requirement: Collect all 10 Monster Zero skulls placed around the map.
steps: Enter the main world and use a mobile or flying kaiju to shorten travel time.
Search each landmark carefully because several skulls are placed inside caves, behind terrain or beside structures.
Collect every skull before returning to the kaiju selection and unlock interface.
Complete any Cell purchase or claim action displayed after the collection requirement is finished.
unlocks.tip: Finish the route in one organized map sweep and record each collected location to avoid revisiting distant regions.

unlocks.name: Monster Zero Skull Checklist
unlocks.requirement: Ten unique skull pickups are required; collecting the same area again does not replace a missing location.
steps: Check elevated mountains and building areas first with a flying kaiju.
Search underwater landmarks with a kaiju that can travel efficiently in water.
Inspect cave interiors, shorelines and the rear side of large map structures.
Open the unlock screen after the tenth pickup to confirm completion.
unlocks.tip: Use the Tokyo locations together, then travel through Hong Kong, Antarctica and Skull Island to reduce backtracking.

unlocks.name: Cell-Purchased Kaiju
unlocks.requirement: Earn the amount of Cells displayed on the roster entry.
steps: Fight other kaiju and continue normal progression to build your Cell balance.
Open the kaiju roster and select the character you want to unlock.
Check whether the entry requires only Cells or also lists a prerequisite kaiju.
Purchase the kaiju after every displayed condition is completed.
unlocks.tip: Save Cells for one strong progression target instead of purchasing several low-priority characters at once.

unlocks.name: Level-Gated Forms
unlocks.requirement: Reach the required level on the listed prerequisite kaiju and complete the displayed Cell requirement.
steps: Own the base kaiju or earlier form shown in the requirement panel.
Level that kaiju through regular battles and map activity.
Return to the roster when the required level is reached.
Buy or claim the advanced form through its roster entry.
unlocks.tip: Level the exact prerequisite form named by the game; progress on a different version of the same kaiju does not count.

unlocks.name: Objective and Collectible Forms
unlocks.requirement: Complete the map task, collectible hunt or special objective listed for the character.
steps: Read every line of the roster requirement before beginning the route.
Choose a kaiju suited to the required terrain, such as flying for mountains or swimming for underwater areas.
Complete all objective counters before leaving the server.
Return to the roster to finish the unlock.
unlocks.tip: Collectible routes are faster in a low-population server where combat is less likely to interrupt travel.

kaijuAlphaLimitBreakAndUpgrades.title: Kaiju Alpha Limit Break and Upgrades
kaijuAlphaLimitBreakAndUpgrades.intro: Limit Break is Kaiju Alpha's advanced investment system for players who have finished the normal leveling phase. It removes the standard progression limit for a selected kaiju and opens a much longer post-cap grind.

upgrades.name: Reach the Normal Level Cap
upgrades.requirement: Finish the normal leveling path for the kaiju you plan to upgrade.
upgrades.benefit: Makes the kaiju eligible for its next progression step.
upgrades.advice: Choose one main kaiju and finish its levels before dividing playtime across the roster.

upgrades.name: Purchase Limit Break
upgrades.requirement: Use the Limit Break option shown in the selected kaiju's progression interface and pay the displayed cost.
upgrades.benefit: Removes the normal level restriction and opens post-cap progression.
upgrades.advice: Treat Limit Break as a major Cell investment and buy it first for a kaiju you regularly use.

upgrades.name: Level Beyond the Normal Cap
upgrades.requirement: Continue earning experience with the Limit Broken kaiju.
upgrades.benefit: Provides additional long-term progression beyond the standard roster level range.
upgrades.advice: Use a kaiju with reliable attacks and good survival so more of each session produces useful experience.

upgrades.name: Level 200 Goal
upgrades.requirement: Complete the extended post-Limit Break leveling path.
upgrades.benefit: Reaches the advanced level demonstrated by fully developed kaiju such as Level 200 SpaceGodzilla.
upgrades.advice: Expect this stage to require repeated battles rather than a single unlock objective.

upgrades.name: Efficient Experience Farming
upgrades.requirement: Stay active in fights, land abilities consistently and avoid repeated early deaths.
upgrades.benefit: Improves the amount of useful progression gained during each session.
upgrades.advice: Reliable damage and survival are more useful for leveling than repeatedly attempting slow attacks that rarely connect.

upgrades.name: First Investment Choice
upgrades.requirement: Compare your most-used PvP, farming and event kaiju before spending resources.
upgrades.benefit: Prevents expensive upgrades from being locked to a character you rarely play.
upgrades.advice: Limit Break your main all-purpose kaiju first, then upgrade specialized characters after the first grind is complete.

kaijuAlphaUpdatesAndNewKaiju.title: Kaiju Alpha Updates and New Kaiju
kaijuAlphaUpdatesAndNewKaiju.intro: Kaiju Alpha updates frequently rotate the live experience title and add new playable monsters. The recent sequence has introduced Final Wars Godzilla, Showa Jet Jaguar, Godzilla Aquatilis and Titanus Doug while keeping the standard five-skill and two-roar control layout.

updates.headline: Final Wars Godzilla
changes: Final Wars Godzilla became the headline kaiju on the live Roblox experience.
The roster continues to use five skill slots mapped to keys 1 through 5.
Roar abilities remain mapped to R and T.

updates.headline: Showa Jet Jaguar
changes: Added Showa Jet Jaguar as a playable kaiju.
Showa Jet Jaguar uses the current five-skill and two-roar control structure.
The testing experience previously featured Jet Jaguar before the live release.

updates.headline: Godzilla Aquatilis
changes: The update introduced a complete five-ability moveset for the aquatic kaiju.
Its listed attacks included Aquatic Chomp, Tsunami Twirl, Parting of the Red Sea and Piscivore Nudge.

updates.headline: Titanus Doug
changes: Added Titanus Doug to the playable roster.
The update retained the standard controls of Skills 1 through 5 and Roars R and T.

updates.headline: Queen MUTO and G19 Damage Changes
changes: Raised the maximum damage of G19 Skills 2, 3 and 4 from 250 to 300.

updates.headline: Monster X
changes: Added Monster X to Kaiju Alpha.
The release introduced a dedicated Monster X moveset and combat showcase.

updates.headline: Pre-Release Kaiju and Bug Testing
changes: The separate Kaiju Alpha TESTING experience is used for unfinished additions and bug testing.
Testing servers can reset while fixes are being applied.
Players are directed to report discovered bugs through the community server.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Kaiju Alpha

questions.question: What is Kaiju Alpha?
questions.answer: Kaiju Alpha is a free Roblox giant monster PvP battleground developed by SULU KAKA, where players control kaiju, destroy cities, earn Cells and battle each other.

questions.question: Is Kaiju Alpha free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Kaiju Alpha is free to play on Roblox across PC, Mac and mobile devices, with no purchase required to join matches.

questions.question: What are Cells in Kaiju Alpha?
questions.answer: Cells are the main progression currency in Kaiju Alpha, earned by destroying buildings and fighting. You spend Cells to unlock new kaiju, advanced forms and upgrades.

questions.question: How do I unlock new kaiju in Kaiju Alpha?
questions.answer: Most kaiju in Kaiju Alpha are unlocked with Cells, while special characters like Monster Zero require completing map objectives such as collecting all ten skulls.

questions.question: What are the controls in Kaiju Alpha?
questions.answer: Kaiju Alpha uses keys 1 to 5 for your five skills, R and T for two roars, WASD to move and the mouse to aim the camera.

questions.question: How often does Kaiju Alpha update?
questions.answer: Kaiju Alpha updates frequently add new playable kaiju, balance changes and content tested in a separate Kaiju Alpha TESTING experience before going live.
